title: Figure Skater Alysa Liu Wore This Rare Beauty Lippie During Her Gold-Winning Routine
summary: Let's just say that the Team USA figure skater's lip combo takes the gold.
body: All products and services featured are independently chosen by editors. However, Billboard may receive a commission on orders placed through its retail links, and the retailer may receive certain auditable data for accounting purposes. Alysa Liu won gold during the Women’s Free Skating event held Feb. 19 at the 2026 Milan Cortina Olympics , and one of the first things she reached for? Her lip combo. Getting ready to rock the podium, the 20-year-old was searching for her combo, saying, “Wait, my lipstick!” in an Olympics clip that aired on TV and was captured and posted on TikTok by user Livingmybestbooklife . In the clip, the athlete grabs her lippie, which Sephora’s official account identified in a comment as Selena Gomez’s Rare Beauty Soft Pinch Lip Oil in the shade Delight . Liu then applies, checks her hair in one of the camera’s lenses and heads off to get her medal. Donna Summer’s dramatic piano and strings-led 1978 song “MacArthur Park Suite” served as the soundtrack for Liu’s free skate. The track begins slowly, but picks up toward the middle, making it a great choice to pump up the crowd. After her gold performance, Liu took the i…

title: Salt Bread Is Ready to Win Over the World
summary: The range of flavors and fillings of salt bread have diversified as it has become a global hit | Tano Justin’s Salt Bread, a new bakery in New York City, serves only one food item. Its namesake pastry is a golden-brown horn, glossy-topped and with a glitter of salt. It tears apart to expose not the…
